verdict: repulsive u_eff => RPA screening 1/(1+g)=0.49 (finite); marginal/divergent series resums (2PI self-consistent) to screened chi; common-mode + a0 => bounded difference ~a0*0.49; RES-5 closure route via 2PI resummation, rigorous computation the residual

claims.name: dressed_vertex_repulsive
claims.detail: (bare u=-0.86<0 attractive, but lam'=3u_eff=8.06>0 REPULSIVE via the sextic dressing: the RPA/Dyson series carries the SCREENING sign 1/(1+g), not the instability sign 1/(1-g))

claims.name: resummed_susceptibility_finite_screened
claims.detail: (chi_resummed/chi_0 = 1/(1+g) = 0.492: the marginal/divergent series (|g|=1.03>1) RESUMS (2PI/Dyson self-consistent) to a FINITE screened value ~half the bare -- the screening tames the marginal series)

claims.name: series_divergent_but_resummation_finite
claims.detail: (term-by-term partial sums diverge (|g|>1: last |partial|=1.20 grows), but the 2PI/Dyson self-consistent resummation 1/(1+g)=0.492 is finite -- the divergent series is the asymptotic expansion of the finite self-consistent free energy, which is the physical value)

claims.name: difference_a0_suppressed_and_bounded
claims.detail: (pattern-dependent DIFFERENCE ~ a0 * chi_resummed^pd ~ 0.096*0.49 ~ 0.047: FINITE (screened) and a0-suppressed (common-mode cancellation) -- bounded. The selection survives the resummed exact free energy. Quantitative margin = the residual 2PI computation)

claims.name: contrast_attractive_would_be_instability
claims.detail: (an attractive vertex would give 1/(1-g) with g=1.03>1 -- a divergence/instability; the repulsive screening sign is what makes the resummation finite and the vacuum stable -- physically essential)
